Obsidian Flamberge  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 50
DMG: 20 Dmg Bonus: 168
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Obsidian Shatter (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 17
WT: 9.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Obsidian Flamberge
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 50
DMG: 20 Dmg Bonus: 168
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Obsidian Shatter (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 17
WT: 9.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Slashing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-23 23:22:34
Page Updated:Sat Dec 7th, 2024

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 28
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Solusek's Eye (Solusek A)
NPC Name
reckless efreeti


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Solusek's Eye (Solusek A)

Berserker usable =]
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2005 at 3:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592273489210
Scholar
72 posts
This sword is now berserker usable, Saw him up while hunting with my magician for the epic piece, killed him easily =/ like most other mobs in the zone for a 56 magician.

Anyway, Gonna send a new screenshot in...



~Cuedian Sumasemblirequired- 56 Magician~

why on earth is this no drop...is it quest related? picked this up while sweeping the northern half of sol a.....no one who could use this seemed to want it....

# Dec 03 2001 at 2:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771604173

85 posts
It's not NO DROP on Firiona Vie. ;) Just bought mine for 25pp. Doesn't proc yet though at level 15. I'll try to remember to make a note of it here when it does begin to proc.
▲ Page top
it is no drop everywhere
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2002 at 7:46 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1600042667564
Scholar
200 posts
... you probably bought an Obsidian Shard (a one hand dagger), not this Flamberge, who is DEFINITELY no drop

# Feb 17 2002 at 10:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768010302
View User Forum
31 posts
The Firiona Vie server has diferent rules for no drops than the other servers. He's probably right, it can be dropped there.

Got one
QuoteReply
# Apr 24 2001 at 12:45 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Thank's to a friend i got one. I'm a lvl 19 SK and it procs for 30dd and has a flamelick debuff, quite nice and it also fits the image. My name is Ueuelr on Tunare if you want to see it.
▲ Page top
Proc
QuoteReply
# Feb 19 2001 at 2:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750035034
Scholar
39 posts
Its a 30 point fire direct damage with a dot component as well. It looks like a black 2 handed sword when wielded.
▲ Page top
RE: Proc
QuoteReply
# Nov 27 2001 at 5:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750246078
Scholar
312 posts
It's not a DoT, it's an AC debuff. It lasts about 2 minutes and reduces the targets AC by 6.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2001 at 5:14 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
What does the effect do?
▲ Page top
RE: Effect?
QuoteReply
# Apr 04 2001 at 9:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751537120
8 posts
the effect is a 30pt dd fire based, and a -6 or so ac reducer, very nice with flame lick thats about -13 ac in total, was figthign in paw and it worked very very well
▲ Page top

the affect on this item is 30 DD and 20 DoT.
